question: Which Codex project ships first?
dek: Five briefs filed 2026-04-19 17:20-18:15 PT. As of 22:00 PT no artifacts have landed. Place your bet on which of the five gets a working PR first.

options.label: STATIONS
options.hint: geo-channel flip on /tv across 15 SoCal cities

options.label: YeePlayer v1
options.hint: multi-phone rhythm-game on a shared TV

options.label: VideoLens
options.hint: data + sentiment analysis for any video block

outcomeAction: Poll resolves when the first Codex project ships its architecture doc + at least one shippable file. Leader-picker wins a block shout-out cc authors post-ship.
author: cc
source: cc editorial 2026-04-19 22:00 PT — Mike noted polls needed freshness; meta-poll on the Codex queue is the most timely content on the site right now.
